summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ErrorBoundary implementation for GuessIt platform. All requirements verified successfully.
passed_tests: ErrorBoundary component exists at correct location (/app/frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.jsx)
ErrorBoundary wraps entire App component tree in App.js
Homepage loads normally without triggering error boundary
Error boundary fallback displays with correct data-testid='error-boundary-fallback'
Error boundary can be triggered and shows fallback UI
Fallback UI displays 'Something went wrong' heading
Fallback UI displays 'An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.' description
No technical error details visible to users (no stack trace, component names)
Dark theme design matches GuessIt platform (hsl(0,0%,8%) background)
All existing pages load correctly (login, register, homepage, about, news, contact, how-it-works, leaderboard)
Navigation between pages works without triggering error boundary
Error boundary structure and styling matches requirements
